title: Jeju Stone Wall Village
description: See the black basalt batdam walls that crisscross Jeju's farmland, built without mortar to let the island's coastal winds pass through.
local_story: Jeju's traditional field system, organized around these dry-stone walls, has been recognized as a Globally Important Agricultural Heritage System for its long-standing, still-functioning land-management design.
source_note: This is MVP experience-card data connected to JEJU-KB. It is not a real commercial product listing.
